metadata.description: Name of the Azure Data Factory instance

properties.description: Mapping data flow for metadata transformation and enrichment. Processes SharePoint file metadata, adds migration tracking fields, categorizes files by type and size, and prepares data for audit reporting.

sources.name: AuditLogSource
sources.description: Read from migration audit log table

sinks.name: EnrichedMetadataSink
sinks.description: Write enriched metadata to ADLS as Parquet

transformations.name: DeriveSizeCategory
transformations.description: Categorize files by size (Small, Medium, Large, XLarge)

transformations.name: ExtractPathComponents
transformations.description: Extract site, library, and folder path from source path

transformations.name: AddMigrationMetrics
transformations.description: Add migration tracking metrics and timestamps

transformations.name: FilterSuccessful
transformations.description: Filter to only successfully migrated files

typeProperties.script:
source(output(
        Id as long,
        FileName as string,
        SourcePath as string,
        DestinationPath as string,
        FileSizeBytes as long,
        Checksum as string,
        MigrationStatus as string,
        Timestamp as timestamp,
        ErrorDetails as string,
        PipelineRunId as string
    ),
    allowSchemaDrift: true,
    validateSchema: false,
    isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
    format: 'table') ~> AuditLogSource
AuditLogSource filter(MigrationStatus == 'Success' || MigrationStatus == 'IncrementalSync') ~> FilterSuccessful
FilterSuccessful derive(FileExtension = lower(right(FileName, length(FileName) - instr(FileName, '.', length(FileName) - 5))),
        FileCategory = case(
            endsWith(lower(FileName), '.pdf') || endsWith(lower(FileName), '.doc') || endsWith(lower(FileName), '.docx') || endsWith(lower(FileName), '.txt'), 'Document',
            endsWith(lower(FileName), '.xls') || endsWith(lower(FileName), '.xlsx') || endsWith(lower(FileName), '.csv'), 'Spreadsheet',
            endsWith(lower(FileName), '.ppt') || endsWith(lower(FileName), '.pptx'), 'Presentation',
            endsWith(lower(FileName), '.jpg') || endsWith(lower(FileName), '.jpeg') || endsWith(lower(FileName), '.png') || endsWith(lower(FileName), '.gif') || endsWith(lower(FileName), '.bmp'), 'Image',
            endsWith(lower(FileName), '.mp4') || endsWith(lower(FileName), '.avi') || endsWith(lower(FileName), '.mov') || endsWith(lower(FileName), '.wmv'), 'Video',
            endsWith(lower(FileName), '.mp3') || endsWith(lower(FileName), '.wav'), 'Audio',
            endsWith(lower(FileName), '.zip') || endsWith(lower(FileName), '.rar') || endsWith(lower(FileName), '.7z'), 'Archive',
            'Other'
        )) ~> DeriveFileCategory
DeriveFileCategory derive(SizeCategory = case(
            FileSizeBytes < 1048576, 'Small (<1MB)',
            FileSizeBytes < 10485760, 'Medium (1-10MB)',
            FileSizeBytes < 104857600, 'Large (10-100MB)',
            'XLarge (>100MB)'
        ),
        FileSizeMB = round(FileSizeBytes / 1048576.0, 2)) ~> DeriveSizeCategory
DeriveSizeCategory derive(SiteName = substring(SourcePath, 8, iif(instr(SourcePath, '/', 8) > 0, instr(SourcePath, '/', 8) - 8, length(SourcePath) - 8)),
        LibraryName = substring(SourcePath, iif(instr(SourcePath, '/', 8) > 0, instr(SourcePath, '/', 8) + 1, 0), 50),
        FolderDepth = length(SourcePath) - length(replace(SourcePath, '/', ''))) ~> ExtractPathComponents
ExtractPathComponents derive(MigrationDate = toDate(Timestamp),
        MigrationHour = hour(Timestamp),
        DayOfWeek = dayOfWeek(Timestamp),
        IsWeekend = dayOfWeek(Timestamp) == 1 || dayOfWeek(Timestamp) == 7,
        ProcessingTimestamp = currentTimestamp()) ~> AddMigrationMetrics
AddMigrationMetrics sink(allowSchemaDrift: true,
    validateSchema: false,
    format: 'parquet',
    partitionFileNames:['enriched-metadata.parquet'],
    umask: 0022,
    preCommands: [],
    postCommands: [],
    skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
    skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true,
    partitionBy('key',
        0,
        MigrationDate
    )) ~> EnrichedMetadataSink
